subject: assets(icons): regenerate PNGs at 400 DPI with geometricPrecision
body:
All 6 icon PNGs regenerated from the updated SVG source using the
new 400 DPI density setting and shape-rendering="geometricPrecision".

Tags: icons, assets, rendering
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: app-icons
Semver: patch
